## [Unreleased]

### Added

- New feature shipped (PR-A) per leadership principle #4. WS3-A reliability fix.
- Fixed a bug (P0-1) discovered during /autoplan review. Approach B was chosen over Approach A.

- god-module split deferred. Phase A complete; Phase B1 in progress.
